title: Phase
description: Spec 371 — a walkable-skill phase. Structural fields drive the walker (gate/invoke/verbs); the inline content fields (goal/instructions/example/done_when/freedom) make the phase self-contained (A1) and the single source for both the walk and the rendered file (A2). The authoritative validator is agency/_skill_parse.py::parse_phase; this schema is the published contract.

instructions.description: the inline steps a non-skill-walk agent follows top-to-bottom (A1/A2)

freedom.description: degrees of freedom — match to fragility (R8)
